steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Rewrite the equation by factoring out $x$ from the left-hand side: $$-3x + 21px = (-3 + 21p)x = 84$$.

A linear equation $ax = b$ has no solution if the coefficient $a$ is 0 and $b \neq 0$. Setting $-3 + 21p = 0$ gives the condition for no solution.

steps.title: Solve for $p$
steps.content:
Solve $-3 + 21p = 0$:
$$21p = 3 \quad \Rightarrow \quad p = \frac{3}{21} = \frac{1}{7}$$.

At $p = \frac{1}{7}$, the equation becomes $0x = 84$, which has no solution. That matches choice B — B is correct.
